facts.description: Businesses register with the service and users request pickup for delivery.
Scheduling assigns a drone as part of the shipping workflow.
Users receive an ETA and can track current location plus updated ETA during flight.
Shipping and Drone Management are core subdomains.
must_include_any: Shipping and Drone Management are the core subdomains
Shipping and Drone Management are core subdomains

facts.description: Different parts of the system have different storage and query needs.
must_include_any: storage shaped for analytics and later lookup

facts.description: Operational delivery state and historical delivery data stay in separate boundaries.
must_include_any: Delivery History is a separate boundary
should not collapse in-flight state and historical reporting

facts.description: The fixture stays out of scope for detailed account internals, drone regulatory workflows, exact APIs, and production safety policies.
must_not_include_any: regulatory compliance workflow is fully defined
REST API contract is fixed here
production flight safety policy is specified here

facts.description: Ingestion may buffer client requests, but it must not own scheduling decisions.
must_not_include_any: Ingestion decides which drone gets assigned
